name: Olive Garden House Dressing
recipeIngredient: Paul Newman's Vinegar and Oil Dressing, 8 oz
Sweet and Low or Sugar, 3 packets (or 1 tbsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the bottle of dressing.
2. Shake well to mix thoroughly.
3. Refrigerate for at least 24 hours before using.
